ksa_text: Skill in evaluating AI bias and fairness, including designing and executing fairness metrics, detecting and measuring bias throughout the AI lifecycle, and conducting privacy risk assessment.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-003 (AI Governance/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.536, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.536). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. ISO 8000 data quality management: data quality standards implementation, certification processes, ISO 8000 compliance oversight, data exchange standard management, and quality system governance.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.536, and AI Governance (AG) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA for ISO 8000 Data Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance competencies do not appear as ISO 8000 Data Manager requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. AI Governance is not a ISO 8000 Data Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
